subcodes.first_line: O ye two brothers! Like unto the Twin Stars ye shine forth and radiate, the light of Truth casting its rays of divine love throughout the world of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر چون فرقدان درخشنده و تابان نور حقیقی در عالم خلق پرتو محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
